item.title: Concord Biotech Ltd Surges 7.12% to Day's High of Rs 1152.3 — Outperforms Sector by 7.02 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex climbed 1.25% on 29 Apr 2026, yet Concord Biotech Ltd outpaced both the benchmark and its sector with a robust 7.12% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 1152.3. That 7.02-percentage-point outperformance signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 3 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Ratnaveer Precision Engineering Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 187.6
item.description: Surging to an intraday peak of Rs 187.6 on 29 Apr 2026, Ratnaveer Precision Engineering Ltd has marked a significant milestone by reaching a fresh 52-week high. This achievement comes amid a strong technical backdrop and sustained momentum that has propelled the stock well above its one-year low of Rs 120.7, delivering a 28.63% return over the past year compared to the Sensex’s decline of 3.06%. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts NMDC Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 92.18
item.description: With a decisive break above Rs 92.18 on 29 Apr 2026, NMDC Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, propelled by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and sustained price momentum that has carried the stock through multiple moving average levels. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Sar Auto Products Ltd Hits New 52-Week High of Rs 2387 on Back of Strong Technical Signals
item.description: Surging to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 2387 on 29 Apr 2026, Sar Auto Products Ltd has demonstrated robust price momentum, outpacing its sector and the broader market with a 21.23% gain over the past year compared to the Sensex’s decline of 3.06%. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Wheels India Ltd. to 52-Week High of Rs 1110
item.description: With a decisive break above Rs 1110 on 29 Apr 2026, Wheels India Ltd. has reached a fresh 52-week high, extending its impressive rally that has delivered a 64.64% return over the past year. This milestone reflects a strong confluence of technical momentum and sustained earnings growth, setting the stage for continued market attention. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Cummins India Ltd. to 52-Week High of Rs 5321
item.description: With a sustained rally that has propelled Cummins India Ltd. to a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs 5321 on 29 Apr 2026, the stock’s momentum is underpinned by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and robust price action across multiple timeframes. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Coal India Ltd. to 52-Week High of Rs 485.6
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 485.6 on 29 Jun 2026, Coal India Ltd. has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a significant milestone in its price momentum. This advance comes amid a backdrop of strong technical signals and sustained buying interest, underscoring the stock's robust upward trajectory over the past year. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Borana Weaves Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5.0% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 354.1, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Borana Weaves Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5.0% on 29 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: DEE Development Engineers Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5% Gain Amid Delivery Drop
item.description: At Rs 422.9, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. DEE Development Engineers Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5% on 29 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Market Signals
item.description: Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Ltd (MAZDOCK) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and potential directional bets. The stock outperformed its sector and broader indices on 29 Apr 2026, reflecting growing investor interest amid evolving market positioning. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Anlon Technology Solutions Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 18.54% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 530.4, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Anlon Technology Solutions Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 18.54% on 29 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Hitachi Energy India Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Signalling Strong Market Positioning
item.description: Hitachi Energy India Ltd (POWERINDIA) has witnessed a remarkable surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, with OI more than doubling to 27,825 contracts from 13,392, marking a 107.8% increase. This sudden spike, coupled with steady volume and price momentum, suggests a significant shift in market positioning and directional bets among traders and investors. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Secmark Consultancy Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 4.97% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 122.44, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Secmark Consultancy Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 4.97% on 29 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Bharat Dynamics Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Bharat Dynamics Ltd (BDL), a key player in the Aerospace & Defense sector, has witnessed a notable 15.8% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this uptick, the stock’s recent performance remains cautiously aligned with sector trends, reflecting a complex interplay of bullish bets and cautious sentiment among traders. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Gayatri Highways Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 2.7% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 2.33, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Gayatri Highways Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5% on 29 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Cochin Shipyard Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Strong Price Momentum
item.description: Cochin Shipyard Ltd (COCHINSHIP) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. The stock has outperformed its sector and broader indices, supported by robust volume and sustained buying interest over the past week. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Momentum
item.description: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Ltd (CROMPTON) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. The stock has outperformed its sector peers, registering a 3.06% gain on 29 Apr 2026, alongside a robust 18.7% increase in open interest, suggesting fresh directional bets and increased participation from traders. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Motilal Oswal Financial Services Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd (MOTILALOFS) has witnessed a notable 10.67% increase in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a modest 0.08% price change on 29 Apr 2026, the surge in OI alongside rising delivery volumes suggests evolving directional bets within the capital markets sector. Time: 19 minutes ago
